data.name: Hentai Cyberpunk
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Cyberpunk is a Third Person Shooter Game, Wave Based.

Fight to survive the waves of enemies falling on you with their own abilities, also formidable Bosses.

Fight against robotic enemies !

  • Different AIs to challenge you, all differents; unique !
  • 5 camera angles to have fun (Always there ;) )
  • Futuristic Firearms (Assault Rifle, Shotgun, Sniper, Rocket Launcher)
  • Glute and Breast Physic !
  • Amazing Maps in a far distant future !
  • Futuristic Sci-Fi theme

data.short_description: Fight against robotic enemies ! In a sexy and futuristic Wave Based Game !
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2Ghz Processor or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD R9 270
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel I3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 TI or AMD R9 280X or Better
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
